summary: Fixed the reported Settings UI capacity gap for Codex OAuth profiles. The broader profile-bound Omnigent host lifecycle remains unimplemented and is explicitly retained below.

gapStatuses.resolved: Settings renders capacity as fixed at one, forces one in save payloads, and has focused component coverage. Existing create/update backend row validation rejects other values.
gapStatuses.remaining: Seed repair/migration readiness, runtime selection, host allocation, reconnect, disconnect, and their lifecycle tests remain missing.

gapStatuses.requirement: Shared capacity lane for direct, Omnigent, and maintenance consumers
gapStatuses.remaining: Wire all consumers to provider-profile-manager:codex_cli with retry-idempotent acquisition and release-last semantics.

gapStatuses.requirement: Safe runtime-neutral auth, mount, binding, generation, and host lease refs
gapStatuses.remaining: Add the verifier-listed secret-free schemas, persistence, ownership checks, and generation validation.

gapStatuses.requirement: Destination OAuth-home materialization and Codex preflight
gapStatuses.remaining: Mount and prepare only the selected OAuth home, clear competing credentials, and run the redacted destination preflight and generation checks.

gapStatuses.requirement: Static and on-demand profile-bound Omnigent hosts
gapStatuses.remaining: Add the dedicated Compose host and idempotent on-demand launcher using one binding/readiness contract.
Resolve executionProfileRef to the exact leased host, validate generation, reject unrelated manual targets, and persist safe routing refs before session use.

gapStatuses.requirement: Reconnect, disconnect, cleanup ordering, and reconciliation
gapStatuses.remaining: Implement drain, generation increment, stale-host invalidation, release-last cleanup, and idempotent recovery for the verifier-listed failure cases.
Attribute failures to the profile, fail closed, drain the host, and publish secret-safe lifecycle and cleanup evidence.

gapStatuses.requirement: Checkpoint, reattach, restore, and branch isolation
gapStatuses.remaining: Persist safe identity refs only and implement generation-aware live reattach, newly leased cold restore, and exclusive branches.
Add the verifier-listed unit, workflow-boundary, hermetic integration, and combined-stack coverage for the still-missing runtime lifecycle.
